clusters.justification: These terms rely on limbic and salience network co-activations to process internal emotional reactivity, mood states, and valenced physiological arousal.
This cluster reflects cortico-striatal circuitry functioning to compute incentive salience, appraise biological or abstract rewards, and drive motivated choices.
These terms map onto the default mode network, representing the macro-level capacity for generating abstract internal models of self, agents, and interpersonal histories.
